scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared-config && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/api run start:dev
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:shared-config && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/worker run start:dev
scripts.dev:dashboard: npm run build:shared-config && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/dashboard run dev
scripts.start:api: npm run build:shared-config && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/api run start
scripts.start:worker: npm run build:shared-config && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/worker run start
scripts.start:dashboard: npm run build:shared-config && NODE_ENV=production node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/dashboard run start
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared-config && npm --workspace @aicp/api run build
scripts.build:worker: npm run build:shared-config && npm --workspace @aicp/worker run build
scripts.build:dashboard: npm run build:shared-config && NODE_ENV=production node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/dashboard run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint:workspaces && npm run lint:structure
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared-config && npm run typecheck:workspaces
